# AquaMind - Deployment Package

This folder contains the production-ready build of the AquaMind website, organized for Monster Hosting deployment.

## 📁 Folder Structure

```
dist/
├── index.html                    # Main homepage
├── aquaguard.html               # AquaGuard game page
├── interactive-house.html       # Interactive house simulation
├── marketplace.html             # Marketplace page
├── stories.html                 # Stories & Charts page
├── admin-login.html             # Admin login page
├── admin-dashboard.html         # Admin dashboard
├── product-details.html         # Product details page
│
└── assets/
    ├── css/                     # All stylesheets (9 files)
    ├── js/                      # All JavaScript files (10 files)
    ├── images/                  # All images (16 files)
    └── docs/                    # PDF documents (2 files)
```

## 🚀 Deployment Instructions for Monster Hosting

1. **Upload the entire `dist` folder contents** to your Monster Hosting account
2. Make sure `index.html` is in the root directory
3. Ensure the `assets` folder structure is preserved
4. Set `index.html` as your default/home page

## ✅ What's Included

- 8 HTML pages with updated asset paths
- 9 CSS stylesheets in `assets/css/`
- 10 JavaScript files in `assets/js/`
- 16 image files in `assets/images/`
- 2 PDF documents in `assets/docs/`

## 🔗 Asset Paths

All asset paths have been updated to use the following structure:
- CSS: `assets/css/filename.css`
- JS: `assets/js/filename.js`
- Images: `assets/images/filename.png`
- Docs: `assets/docs/filename.pdf`

## 📝 Notes

- All HTML files are ready for production
- External dependencies (Google Fonts, Font Awesome) are loaded via CDN
- No build process required - upload and go!

---

**AquaMind** - Smarter Water Solutions for a Greener Tomorrow
